root_cause: I over-promoted a low absolute calibrated-probability basket model as a single-name/same-day trade. Execution bands and stops were heuristic, not learned. Raw model probabilities were not calibrated enough to justify live single-name conviction.
action_change: Do not issue same-day +5% calls unless the run is complete, current-slice data is fully verified, calibrated top-bucket hit rate clears a stricter threshold, and entry/exit rules are learned/backtested rather than percentage heuristics.
